scope.target: Remaining placeholder disposition, duplicate example catalogs, and shared fixture consolidation
constraints: Preserve deliberate BDDfy and Gherkin modes
Rewrite, demote to reference/historical, or retire unresolved EzDDD and uContract placeholder APIs
Use evidence-manifest tiers during every merge or retirement
Delete only after replacement links and file dispositions exist
non_goals: Reclassify evidence strength without new proof

steps: Compare README, INDEX, TEMPLATE-INDEX, and duplicated discovery surfaces
Complete concept-to-owner disposition for remaining contract, usecase, outbox, mapper, and test placeholders
Select one catalog owner per navigation purpose
Update links and file dispositions before retirement
execution.last_completed_step: Consolidated catalogs and BDD routes, retired hollow fixtures, classified placeholder families, and added library-neutral contract semantics.
execution.next_action: Execute ARCH-001 minimal micro-system/mono-system logical grammar.

results.summary: Made INDEX the sole evidence-aware catalog, retired the stale template index and hollow product/test fixtures, reduced four BDD routes to distinct BDDfy and Reqnroll modes, consolidated exact duplicates, downgraded placeholder-heavy families, and introduced machine-validated placeholder dispositions plus library-neutral Design by Contract semantics.
tests_run: AI-context validator: passed with 12 owned rules
Exact duplicate scan: only intentional ASP.NET environment aliases remain
results.finding_status: AIC-005 and AIC-006 resolved subject to independent verification
results.residual_risk: Reference-only folders still contain historical placeholder code by design; validators prevent evidence-tier inflation, and active review/standard routes no longer use them as API truth.
